name: Potato Salad (Satterly)
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Potatoes, peeled, cooked, cooled & cubed
recipeInstructions:
1. Put the cooked potatoes and blanched vegetables (including celery and bell pepper) in a large bowl.
2. In a blender, combine the olive oil, lemon juice, brown sugar, garlic, Tabasco sauce, parsley, salt, and pepper. Blend for a few seconds until smooth.
3. Pour the blended dressing over the vegetables and gently toss to coat everything well.
4. Chill the salad in the refrigerator.
